title.en: The Respiration of the Emerald Void

description.ko: 생물 발광 이끼와 혈관 네트워크를 통해 자연의 호흡이 리듬감 있게 흐르는 모습을 심해에서 영감을 받은 유기적 구조로 표현했습니다.
description.en: A deep-sea inspired organic structure representing the rhythmic flow of nature's breath through bioluminescent moss and vascular networks.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, depicting a complex respiratory lung-like organism woven from translucent #7FB069 emerald moss and deep #2D5A3D vascular vines. The entity floats in a silent, #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid void, rhythmically inhaling #FFE66D bioluminescent spores that shimmer like liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes revealing internal capillary networks of glowing sap. 8k resolution, rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh.
